rawDeclarations.name: Apache 2.0
rawDeclarations.comments:
While the EULA for the Android SDK restricts distribution of those binaries, the source code 
				is licensed under Apache 2.0 which allows compiling binaries from source and then distributing
				those versions.

licencePolicyEvidence.scopeRestrictedRationale: Independent POM review confirmed these exact components are build, internal-tooling or test-only and are not packaged in :app releaseRuntimeClasspath. Any scope promotion requires a separate owner or legal review.
licencePolicyEvidence.androidSdkAcceptance: James personally accepted the installed Android SDK licence prompts on 2026-07-11; this evidence applies only to local build tooling and does not approve packaged redistribution.
licencePolicyEvidence.playBillingRedistributionReview: The official Google Play Billing Library 9.1.0 and its exact locked Google Play services runtime closure are approved only for this Play-distributed app; no unrelated Android SDK-licensed runtime is approved. Reviewed 2026-07-15.
